name: Hard to Tell They Are Turkey Burritos
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ground raw turkey breast (no skin)
1/2 cup Medium taco sauce (or hot for more spice)
8 medium Flour tortillas (made with vegetable oil)
1/2 cup Shredded reduced-fat or -non-fat Cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a skillet with cooking spray and place over medium heat until hot.
2. Add turkey to the skillet and cook until browned, stirring constantly.
3. Drain excess fat from the turkey.
4. Add taco sauce to the skillet and stir.
5. Remove turkey and transfer it to a serving dish or casserole.
6. Add tomatoes, zucchini, onion, and bell pepper to the skillet and sauté for 5 minutes until crisp-tender.
7. Stir in salt and pepper, then add the vegetables back to the skillet and mix with the turkey.
8. Heat tortillas in a microwave for 1 minute.
9. Spoon the turkey mixture onto the center of each heated tortilla.
10. Top each burrito with cheese and roll up tightly.
